description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 20, 2026 at 2:29 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Culver City, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Venice Boulevard at Hughes Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northeastbound in autonomous mode in the third from the right lane on Venice Boulevard when it slowed to 
a stop for a red light at the intersection with Hughes Avenue. While the Waymo AV was stopped, an SUV traveling northeastbound in the 
third from the right lane on Venice Boulevard approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear 
of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver 
was present in the driver’s seating position. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
